CREATE TABLE test_month_intervals (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, interval_val INTERVAL MONTH);
INSERT INTO test_month_intervals (interval_val) VALUES (INTERVAL '1' MONTH), (INTERVAL '12' MONTH), (INTERVAL '-1' MONTH), (INTERVAL '-12' MONTH);
CREATE TABLE related_dates (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, start_date DATE);
SELECT rd.id, rd.start_date, rd.start_date + interval_val FROM related_dates rd JOIN test_month_intervals ti ON rd.id = 1 WHERE interval_val < INTERVAL '10' MONTH;
SELECT rd.id, rd.start_date, rd.start_date + (INTERVAL '3' MONTH * 2) AS new_date FROM related_dates rd;
INSERT INTO test_month_intervals (interval_val) SELECT INTERVAL '2' MONTH * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM related_dates) FROM DUAL;
SELECT rd.id, rd.start_date, rd.start_date + (SELECT SUM(interval_val) FROM test_month_intervals) AS total_months_added FROM related_dates rd;
SELECT rd.id, rd.start_date, rd.start_date + INTERVAL (SELECT MIN(interval_val) FROM test_month_intervals) MONTH AS min_interval FROM related_dates rd;
SELECT rd.start_date, rd.start_date + INTERVAL '5' MONTH AS modified_date FROM related_dates rd WHERE (rd.start_date + INTERVAL '5' MONTH) < CURRENT_DATE;
